channel.title: GameMaps L4D2 Files
channel.description: RSS feed for GameMaps L4D2 Files.

item.title: [ Mod ] Turtle Rock's Tank (For L4D1 Campaigns) ORIGINAL BY THEUAREDEAD
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 3
DESCRIPCIÓN ESPAÑOL ESTE MOD CONTIENE ALGUNOS CAMBIOS QUE SUBIO EL CREADOR ORIGINAL THEUAREDEAD LOS CAMBIOS FUERON AJUSTES MAS FIELES AL TANK DE LEFT 1 ORIGINAL SIN ROMPER NADA TAMBIEN SE AJUSTO EL .VMT DEL TANK CREDITS https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199392313412/ AL HACERLO MAS FIEL AL TANK DE LEFT 1 ORIGINAL Y AJUSTAR EL .VMT https://steamcommunity.com/id/itsa2by4 CREADOR DEL MOD ORIGINAL DESCRIPTION ENGLISH) THIS MOD CONTAINS SOME CHANGES UPLOADED BY THE ORIGINAL CREATOR, THEUAREDEAD. THE CHANGES ARE ADJUSTMENTS TO BE MORE FAITHFUL TO THE ORIGINAL LEFT 1 TANK WITHOUT BREAKING ANYTHING. THE TANK'S .VMT FILE WAS ALSO ADJUSTED. CREDITS https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199392313412/ BY MAKING IT MORE FAITHFUL TO THE ORIGINAL LEFT 1 TANK AND ADJUSTING THE .VMT FILE https://steamcommunity.com/id/itsa2by4 CREATOR OF THE ORIGINAL MOD
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 3
DESCRIPCIÓN ESPAÑOL ESTE MOD CONTIENE ALGUNOS CAMBIOS QUE SUBIO EL CREADOR ORIGINAL THEUAREDEAD LOS CAMBIOS FUERON AJUSTES MAS FIELES AL TANK DE LEFT 1 ORIGINAL SIN ROMPER NADA TAMBIEN SE AJUSTO EL .VMT DEL TANK CREDITS https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199392313412/ AL HACERLO MAS FIEL AL TANK DE LEFT 1 ORIGINAL Y AJUSTAR EL .VMT https://steamcommunity.com/id/itsa2by4 CREADOR DEL MOD ORIGINAL DESCRIPTION ENGLISH) THIS MOD CONTAINS SOME CHANGES UPLOADED BY THE ORIGINAL CREATOR, THEUAREDEAD. THE CHANGES ARE ADJUSTMENTS TO BE MORE FAITHFUL TO THE ORIGINAL LEFT 1 TANK WITHOUT BREAKING ANYTHING. THE TANK'S .VMT FILE WAS ALSO ADJUSTED. CREDITS https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199392313412/ BY MAKING IT MORE FAITHFUL TO THE ORIGINAL LEFT 1 TANK AND ADJUSTING THE .VMT FILE https://steamcommunity.com/id/itsa2by4 CREATOR OF THE ORIGINAL MOD

item.title: [ 5 Maps ] View of Hell
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
VIEW OF HELL CUSTOM CAMPAIGN You need to download part 2 for the campaign to work Campaign description: The survivors had a helicopter accident and crashed into a deserted area. Initially, they were not far from the airport, but when they arrived, they were too late. Their only escape was a cruise ship. They had heard that someone there might be the only hope of salvation. Credits: I did this campaign solo. I started working on it in 2022, but with breaks. Of course, the custom pieces were taken from other games like No More Room in Hell, Black Mesa, and CS:GO, and the models were from a sidekick I haven't contacted in a while. This is my fourth campaign. I don't know if I've learned anything over the years, but I've added more stuff since the last one, like this unrelenting morning.
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
VIEW OF HELL CUSTOM CAMPAIGN You need to download part 2 for the campaign to work Campaign description: The survivors had a helicopter accident and crashed into a deserted area. Initially, they were not far from the airport, but when they arrived, they were too late. Their only escape was a cruise ship. They had heard that someone there might be the only hope of salvation. Credits: I did this campaign solo. I started working on it in 2022, but with breaks. Of course, the custom pieces were taken from other games like No More Room in Hell, Black Mesa, and CS:GO, and the models were from a sidekick I haven't contacted in a while. This is my fourth campaign. I don't know if I've learned anything over the years, but I've added more stuff since the last one, like this unrelenting morning.

item.title: [ Mod ] Primaries: Remastered (Ultimate Pack)
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
español - holaaaaa gente todo bien por ahi otro mods mas de Primaries: Remastered (Ultimate Pack) este no es mio sino del Spicy_Jam y solo seria eso XD autor - https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198305695766 mod - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3319521343 English - Hello everyone, how are you? Here's another mod for Primaries: Remastered (Ultimate Pack). This one isn't mine, it's Spicy_Jam's, and that's all XD author - https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198305695766 mod - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3319521343

item.title: [ 4 Maps ] The Extinction
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
The survivors wake up at an abandoned CEDA evacuation center. They must reach the OVERPASS a few miles away from SHORELINE to be rescued at the BEACH. Four map campaign: ------------------------- 1. Ceda Evac 2. The Overpass 3. Shore Line 4. The Beach ====================================== Except under the accounts "ilcannibal" or "Trunten" or "Time Lord Magnum" or "1sg Heartless"
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
The survivors wake up at an abandoned CEDA evacuation center. They must reach the OVERPASS a few miles away from SHORELINE to be rescued at the BEACH. Four map campaign: ------------------------- 1. Ceda Evac 2. The Overpass 3. Shore Line 4. The Beach ====================================== Except under the accounts "ilcannibal" or "Trunten" or "Time Lord Magnum" or "1sg Heartless"

item.title: [ 5 Maps ] Oplan Exodus
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 5
A survivor joins a mission to eliminate a high-value target. After completing the objective, the survivor must fight their way through the infected and escape safely. Oplan Exodus was a very tragic event in the Mamasapano on January 25, 2015.
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 5
A survivor joins a mission to eliminate a high-value target. After completing the objective, the survivor must fight their way through the infected and escape safely. Oplan Exodus was a very tragic event in the Mamasapano on January 25, 2015.
